channel.title: Agentic-AI on Upskills
channel.description: Recent content in Agentic-AI on Upskills

item.title: 10 tips to level up your ai-assisted coding - Aleksander Stensby - NDC Copenhagen 2026
item.description:
10 tips to level up your ai-assisted coding - Aleksander Stensby - NDC Copenhagen 2026

10 tips to level up your Al-Assisted Coding

  1. Context is King!
  2. Skills, skills, skills!
  3. Make a PLAN! (you can use plan mode also)
  4. Let AI verify its work!
  5. Use the best model!
  6. Learn to use the tools, Luke! (Sub-agents & hooks)
  7. Compound - Learn from Rabbit holes!
  8. Power up with CLIs and MCPs!
  9. Release the Agents! 10.Be the human in the loop!

item.title: Agentic Spec Driven Development - Articles
item.description:
Agentic Spec Driven Development

  1. Spec-driven development: The AI engineering workflow at Notion | Ryan Nystrom
